# [Phase 3] Heartbeat-Bypass Detection

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement Heartbeat-Bypass Detection for push-capable identities, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Update `swarm-heartbeat.sh` to consult the `WAKE_SUBSCRIPTION` graph state on startup and per-cycle.
- [ ] Skip heartbeat polling for identities with `harnessTarget` IN (`mcp-notifications`, `a2a-webhook`).
- [ ] Retain heartbeat polling as fallback for `bridge-daemon`, `disabled`, and `none` harness targets.
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.5.
